items.title: Data quality issues delaying migration
items.description: Legacy data has 15% duplicate records. Cleansing may extend migration by 2–3 weeks.
items.response_plan: Engage data cleansing specialist. Run parallel cleansing sprint.

items.title: Key developer leaving project
items.description: Lead developer has accepted role at another company. Last day 2024-04-05.
items.response_plan: Knowledge transfer sessions scheduled. Identify replacement contractor.

items.title: Integration test environment unavailable
items.description: Integration test environment has been down since 2024-03-10 due to infrastructure issue.
items.response_plan: Infrastructure team investigating. Workaround: use pre-prod environment.

items.title: API delivery from Finance System team
items.description: Beta ERP migration requires Finance System team to deliver 3 APIs by 2024-04-30.
items.response_plan: Weekly check-in with Finance System PM. Escalate if delivery date slips.
